title: The Boy Who Forgot His Book
content: Sam was walking home from school when he suddenly stopped on the sidewalk. He remembered that he had left his favorite book on the table at the library. The book had a picture of a dragon on the cover, and Sam had been waiting all week to finish the last chapter. He turned around and ran all the way back to the library before it closed. The librarian smiled and handed him the book from the front desk, where she had kept it safe. Sam thanked her and promised to be more careful next time.

questions.questionText: Why did he go back to the library?
options: Because he forgot his favorite book on the table
Because he wanted to borrow a new dragon book
Because he needed to return an overdue book
Because he wanted to say thank you to the librarian

questions.questionText: What was on the cover of Sam's book?
options: A picture of a friendly librarian
A picture of a tall castle in the clouds
A picture of a dragon breathing fire
A picture of a map leading to treasure

questions.questionText: Who kept the book safe for Sam?
options: His teacher kept it in her desk
The librarian kept it at the front desk
His best friend held onto it for him
He had left it inside his school bag
